next_action: No live continuation job exists. Future work should start from FUTURE_WORK.md: clean seed-B replication on fresh GPU capacity or an external snapshot, formal changepoint/alignment analysis, LLC code hardening, grammar benchmark expansion, and the low-resource guardrail extension.
reason: Primary structured-PT seed-A LLC trajectory is complete and valid (rise-then-plateau bracketing the ~1.5-2.5M grammar transition). Both controls confirm specificity: token-shuffled PT rises then declines to ~28; matched-English rises only smoothly to ~70; neither reproduces the rise-then-plateau (~85). Trajectory shape is robust to localization (loc=100 vs 300 identical). All three AGENTS.md-minimum conditions are complete. The attempted seed-B continuation did not produce an archived usable replication before the VMs were removed, so seed-B is future work.
